revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Text replacement - "[[北海道]]" to "[[Hokkaido]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27993039)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Hokkaido]][[安平町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:あひらちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|あひらちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:安平町の建築物|version=62031223}} {{translated page|ja|安平町の建築物|2=Category:安平町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}

[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Abira, Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Hokkaido by municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Hokkaido]][[安平町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:あひらちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|あひらちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:安平町の建築物|version=62031223}} {{translated page|ja|安平町の建築物|2=Category:安平町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:安平町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tsuruno-yu Onsen (Hokkaido)]] {{Wikidata link|Q27993039}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Abira, Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Hokkaido by municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Hokkaido]][[安平町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:あひらちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|あひらちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:安平町の建築物|version=62031223}} {{translated page|ja|安平町の建築物|2=Category:安平町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:安平町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tsuruno-yu Onsen (Hokkaido)]] {{Wikidata link|Q27993039}} [[Category:cqq]]
[[Category:cqq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Abira, Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Hokkaido by municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27993039)
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{デフォルトソート:あひらちようのけんちくふつ}}
{{座標一覧}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_Abira_Town here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_Abira_Town for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:安平町の建築物|version=62031223}} {{translated page|ja|安平町の建築物|2=Category:安平町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{wikidata link|Q27993039}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:安平町の建築物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tsuruno-yu Onsen (Hokkaido)]] [[Category:Abira, Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Hokkaido by municipality]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]
